name: Alex Carter
shortBio: Leads strategy development and oversees build milestones.
favouriteMoment: Winning first regional championship with a week of battery left.

name: Jordan Lee
shortBio: Architects autonomous routines and fine-tunes robot control code.
favouriteMoment: Seeing the robot perform a perfect autonomous stack for the first time.

name: Sam Taylor
shortBio: Designs and builds structural systems for reliability under load.
favouriteMoment: Finalizing the intake mechanism that held through the toughest matches.

name: Morgan Kim
shortBio: Coordinates scouting, data analysis, and community engagement.
favouriteMoment: Presenting team results to school leadership and gaining a new sponsor.
